name: Sentinel of Rkugamz
location: Sentinel of Rkugamz in Darkshade Caverns I, Maj al-Ragath

bonuses.stat: When you heal yourself or an ally you summon a Dwemer spider that heals for 23-1000 Health and restores 2-125 Magicka and Stamina to you and your allies within 5 meters every 1 second for 8 seconds. This effect can occur once every 15 seconds.
